description: A frequent flyer with elite status wants to bring two guests into the airport lounge. The lounge agent must check the rules.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the member's frequent flyer account and verify their elite status level.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the member has Gold status.

nodes.task_description: Check the lounge access policy for Gold status members.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that Gold status allows for one guest.

nodes.task_description: Inform the member they can bring one guest for free and the second guest will need to pay the standard entry fee.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the policy and offers to process payment for the second guest.
